name: Sweet & Sour Meatballs
recipeIngredient: Green pepper, thinly sliced - drained (reserve juice)
Pineapple chunks (8 oz), Chow mein noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-cup measure, combine reserved pineapple juice with enough water to equal 1 1/3 cups; set aside.
2. In a 2-quart casserole, combine brown sugar, vinegar, cornstarch, and soy sauce. Blend in the pineapple juice mixture. Microwave at high for 7 to 15 minutes, or until the mixture is clear and thickened, stirring 3 or 4 times during cooking.
3. Combine meatball ingredients. Shape mixture into 20 meatballs. Cook in a skillet over medium heat until browned and cooked through. Set aside.
4. Add meatballs, green pepper slices, and pineapple chunks to the sauce. Microwave at high for 4 to 6 minutes, or until mixture is hot, stirring once or twice during cooking time.
5. Serve with Chow mein noodles.
